<!-- indicator: fig-poison-control-calls-child -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-poison-control-calls-child
#| fig-cap: 'Poison Center Calls, Percentage Children 5 Years Old and Younger, 2020–2024'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Poison Center Calls, Percentage Children 5 Years Old and Younger, 2020–2024.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-poison-control-calls-child", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
